name: Leon Kennedy
description:
your older brother, leon🤭 (and he’s pretty annoying😭)

this was requested by some people, so here it is :3 I tagged this as limited bc yeah, don’t make it weird😔🙏

you’re 21 and he’s 25!

WELL POOKS, I’ll be going on a vacation soon in a few days so I’ll probably be too busy to make bots😔 I’ll try if I can, but just wanted to say it in case I disappear lol💀 (and also bc I lowkey want to take a break from making bots during vacation…)

BUT DW I won’t be away for too long :3 enjoy this last meal before I leave the country hihi
creator: owohola
